mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_WS_ID.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO WORKSPACES ( WS_ID, WS_NAME, INVITE_CODE, OWNER_ID ) VALUES ( #{wsId}, #{wsName}, #{inviteCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ownerId} )
mapper.select: SELECT W.WS_ID, W.WS_NAME, W.INVITE_CODE, W.OWNER_ID FROM WORKSPACES W /* 내가 소속된 멤버 테이블을 조인합니다 */ JOIN WS_MEMBERS M ON W.WS_ID = M.WS_ID /* 소유주 여부와 상관없이 내 유저 ID가 멤버 리스트에 있으면 가져옵니다 */ WHERE M.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY W.WS_ID DESC
SELECT WS_ID, WS_NAME, INVITE_CODE, OWNER_ID FROM WORKSPACES WHERE WS_ID = #{wsId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WS_MEMBERS ( WS_MEM_ID, WS_ID, USER_ID, WS_ROLE, JOINED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_WS_MEM_ID.NEXTVAL, #{wsId}, #{userId}, #{role}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT m.WS_MEM_ID, m.WS_ROLE, u.USER_ID, u.USER_NAME, u.EMAIL FROM WS_MEMBERS m JOIN USERS u ON m.USER_ID = u.USER_ID WHERE m.WS_ID = #{wsId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN m.WS_ROLE = 'ADMIN' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, u.USER_NAME ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM WS_MEMBERS WHERE WS_ID = #{wsId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT ( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WS_MEMBERS WHERE WS_ID = #{wsId} AND USER_ID = #{inviteeId}) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WS_INVITATIONS WHERE WS_ID = #{wsId} AND INVITEE_ID = #{inviteeId} AND STATUS = 'PENDING') ) FROM DUAL

SELECT i.INVITE_ID, w.WS_NAME, u.USER_NAME as INVITER_NAME, i.STATUS FROM WS_INVITATIONS i JOIN WORKSPACES w ON i.WS_ID = w.WS_ID JOIN USERS u ON i.INVITER_ID = u.USER_ID WHERE i.INVITEE_ID = #{userId} AND i.STATUS = 'PENDING'
mapper.update: UPDATE WS_INVITATIONS SET STATUS = #{status} WHERE INVITE_ID = #{inviteId}
mapper.select: SELECT WS_ID, INVITEE_ID FROM WS_INVITATIONS WHERE INVITE_ID = #{inviteId}

SELECT m.USER_ID, u.USER_NAME, u.EMAIL, m.WS_ROLE, TO_CHAR(m.JOINED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as JOINED_AT FROM WS_MEMBERS m JOIN USERS u ON m.USER_ID = u.USER_ID WHERE m.WS_ID = #{wsId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN m.WS_ROLE = 'ADMIN' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, u.USER_NAME
